channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年5月12日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Ratty – A terminal emulator with inline 3D graphics #2 Training an LLM in Swift, Part 1: Taking matrix mult from Gflop/s to Tflop/s #3 Hardware Attestation as Monopoly Enabler #4 Gmail registration now requires scanning a QR code and sending a text message #5 Amália and the Future of European Portuguese LLMs #6 Local AI needs to be the norm #7 Venom and Hot Peppers Offer a Key to Killing Resistant Bacteria #8 Driver accused of DUI tracks missing laptop to Illinois State trooper's house #9 Building a web server in aarch64 assembly to give my life (a lack of) meaning #10 Nullsoft, 1997-2004 AOL kills off the last maverick tech company (2004)
